title: Shellshock Configuration
description: Shellshock framework configuration embedded in a project's manifest.json.

tools.description: Tool installation registry, keyed by strategy.

^(local|cargo-install|cargo-binstall|go-.description: Tools installed via this strategy. Keys are binary names.

needs.description: Tools that must be installed first.

args.description: Extra arguments passed to the install command.

crate.description: Crate name when it differs from the binary name (cargo strategies).

pkg.description: Full Go module path (required for go-install strategy).
